description:
Working on the Ui for the collectibles menu! Throughout her adventure, Alice will be able to find unique tarot cards with familiar faces on them. Each card relates to either a character in the story or an important plot point. If she collects all 22 major arcana throughout the game, the player will get a special achievement! 

Thanks to our composer Jack Wyndham here on Youtube for the beautiful score to our game + the song featured here!
fulltitle: HABROMANIA GAMEPLAY Sneak Peek 2 - Collectables Menu
